mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_USER_QUEST_PK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_USER_QUEST ( USER_QUEST_ID, USER_ID, QUEST_ID, STATUS, STARTED_AT, DUE_AT, COMPLETED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{userQuestId}, #{userId}, #{questId}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{dueAt}, #{completedAt}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_QUEST_ID, USER_ID, QUEST_ID, STATUS, STARTED_AT, DUE_AT, COMPLETED_AT, CREATED_AT FROM ( SELECT USER_QUEST_ID, USER_ID, QUEST_ID, STATUS, STARTED_AT, DUE_AT, COMPLETED_AT, CREATED_AT FROM LQ_USER_QUEST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUEST_ID = #{questId} ORDER BY NVL(STARTED_AT, CREATED_AT) DESC, USER_QUEST_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT USER_QUEST_ID, USER_ID, QUEST_ID, STATUS, STARTED_AT, DUE_AT, COMPLETED_AT, CREATED_AT FROM LQ_USER_QUEST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUEST_ID = #{questId}

SELECT uq.USER_QUEST_ID AS userQuestId, uq.USER_ID AS userId, uq.QUEST_ID AS questId, uq.STATUS AS questStatus, uq.STATUS AS status, uq.STARTED_AT AS startedAt, uq.DUE_AT AS dueAt, uq.COMPLETED_AT AS completedAt, uq.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, q.TITLE AS title, q.DESCRIPTION AS description, q.CATEGORY AS category, q.REWARD_EXP AS rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT AS rewardPoint, q.TIME_LIMIT AS timeLimit, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) AS totalLocationCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) AS completedLocationCount, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID )) END AS progressPercent FROM LQ_USER_QUEST uq INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST q ON q.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID WHERE uq.USER_ID = #{_parameter} AND q.STATUS != 'DELETED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN uq.STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 WHEN uq.STATUS = 'SAVED' THEN 2 WHEN uq.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 3 WHEN uq.STATUS = 'ABANDONED' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, NVL(uq.STARTED_AT, uq.CREATED_AT) DESC, uq.USER_QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT uq.USER_QUEST_ID AS userQuestId, uq.USER_ID AS userId, uq.QUEST_ID AS questId, uq.STATUS AS questStatus, uq.STARTED_AT AS startedAt, uq.DUE_AT AS dueAt, uq.COMPLETED_AT AS completedAt, uq.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, q.TITLE AS title, q.DESCRIPTION AS description, q.CATEGORY AS category, q.REWARD_EXP AS rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT AS rewardPoint, q.TIME_LIMIT AS timeLimit, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) AS totalLocationCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) AS completedLocationCount, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID )) END AS progressPercent FROM LQ_USER_QUEST uq INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST q ON uq.QUEST_ID = q.QUEST_ID WHERE uq.USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId}

SELECT uqp.USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_ID AS userQuestProgressId, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID AS questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID AS locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER AS visitOrder, l.NAME AS name, l.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, l.ADDRESS AS address, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, l.LATITUDE AS latitude, l.LONGITUDE AS longitude, l.LOCATION_TYPE AS locationType, l.DESCRIPTION AS description, NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) AS isCompleted, uqp.COMPLETED_AT AS completedAt FROM LQ_USER_QUEST uq INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql ON uq.QUEST_ID = ql.QUEST_ID INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp ON uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND uqp.QUEST_LOCATION_ID = ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID WHERE uq.USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId} ORDER BY ql.VISIT_ORDER ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION WHERE QUEST_ID = ( SELECT QUEST_ID FROM LQ_USER_QUEST WHERE USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId} )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS WHERE USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId} AND NVL(IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1
